question.label: Authority gap
question.name: What authority do you need to own bigger direction well?
question.description: Surfaces the specific decision rights or scope he feels are missing.

answer: If we can define the path precisely, I will commit to it.

assessment.note: He is asking for precise definition of the path before committing, which is a clear clarity signal.

new_queue.label: Priority ranking
new_queue.name: If you had to cut your work in half tomorrow, what would you drop first — and what's non-negotiable?

issues: ref_alias q_support_needed_24 not in remaining queue — treating as new

history.answer_excerpt: I have been less present in rituals, yes.
I have been less present in rituals, yes.
I stayed focused on delivery because that felt controllable.
I can own bigger direction, but I need real authority to do it.
If we can define the path precisely, I will commit to it.

Mentoring has been one place where I still feel useful.
I am not sure the work I am doing is the work that gets recognized.
I want clearer criteria, not reassurance.
